data_table.template:
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd

st.subheader('Data Table')
data = pd.DataFrame({'Column A': [1, 2, 3], 'Column B': ['x', 'y', 'z']})
st.dataframe(data, use_container_width=True)

data_editor.template:
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd

st.subheader('Editable Data')
data = pd.DataFrame({'Name': ['Alice', 'Bob'], 'Score': [90, 85]})
edited = st.data_editor(data, num_rows='dynamic')
st.write('Updated data:', edited)

file_uploader.template:
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd

st.subheader('File Upload')
uploaded = st.file_uploader('Choose a CSV file', type='csv')
if uploaded is not None:
    data = pd.read_csv(uploaded)
    st.dataframe(data)

download_button.template:
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd

data = pd.DataFrame({'A': [1, 2], 'B': [3, 4]})
csv = data.to_csv(index=False)
st.download_button('Download CSV', csv, 'data.csv', 'text/csv')
